TITLE: News: Our Stories
SUBTITLE: Explore how Saayam for All is making headlines and gaining recognition for its work in uplifting communities, empowering volunteers, and building an inclusive support network.
DESCRIPTION: From local stories to national features, discover how our mission is resonating beyond the platform and into the world.
JOIN_BODY: Chat with our community and get in touch with different charity organizations!
STORY_1_TITLE: Ramesh Maturu Named to the 2026 Georgia Titan 100 List
STORY_1_DESC: Pyramid Consulting is pleased to announce that its President and Co-founder Ramesh Maturu, has been named a 2026 Georgia Titan 100, his second recognition following his initial selection in 2024.The Titan 100 program honors Georgia’s Top 100 CEOs and C-level executives who exemplify exceptional leadership, vision, and passion.
STORY_2_TITLE: With Jensen Huang, CEO of NVIDIA
STORY_2_DESC: Rao with Jensen Huang, CEO of Nvidia in IIT Bay Area Conference.
STORY_3_TITLE: With Vishal Sikka, Founder & CEO of Vianai Systems
STORY_3_DESC: An insightful exchange with Vishal Sikka on leadership, purpose-driven innovation, and building organizations that create long-term impact.
STORY_4_TITLE: With Ramesh Maturu and Ramana Yerneni on Carmel-by-the-Sea, CA beach
STORY_4_DESC: A memorable moment at Carmel-by-the-Sea, California, reflecting on meaningful conversations and connections with Ramesh Maturu and Ramana Yerneni by the Pacific coast.
STORY_5_TITLE: In Step with the Community: A 17-Mile Walk in San Ramon
STORY_5_DESC: Our CEO and Sateesh Mucharla participated in a 17-mile walk through San Ramon, California, championing wellness, unity, and public service.

STORY_6_DESC: A moment with the Indian Consular team during a community engagement event.

STORY_8_TITLE: With Madhusudhan Sai, global humanitarian and spiritual leader and President of Aria University, Anand Kuchibhotla
STORY_8_DESC: A meaningful meeting highlighting values of service, compassion, and purpose-driven initiatives.
STORY_9_TITLE: With Murali Krishnamurthy, CEO of Sankara Eye Foundation
STORY_9_DESC: In conversation with Murali Krishnamurthy, CEO of Sankara Eye Foundation, on strengthening collaborations to improve healthcare accessibility and community impact.
STORY_10_TITLE: With U.S. Representative, Jimmy Panetta and San José City Council member, Domingo Candelas
STORY_10_DESC: A productive discussion with U.S. Representative Jimmy Panetta and San José City Councilmember Domingo Candelas on social impact, healthcare accessibility, and collaborative efforts to uplift local communities.
